title: AI tool to assist with telehealth mental health calls
description: An AI screening tool will help telehealth with some mental health calls. Photo: Getty Images A telehealth service is bringing in an artificial intelligence screening tool for some of its chat responses to help deal with an increasing volume and severity of mental health calls.

title: NSA is said to use Anthropic’s new AI model despite Pentagon dispute

title: The demand for local AI could shape a new business model for Apple
description: To put it simply: Apple Silicon is Mac minis are impossible to find. There’s a variety of reasons for this – like OpenClaw and other computer-use agents. But there’s also a group of people buying up high-end Macs with swaths of unified memory, which are incredible for running local LLMs. While I’m sure Apple appreciates the additional hardware sales, I think they could push this even further – by entering a segment they’ve thus far ignored. more...
